alerts.message: AUC surpassed $0.6T driven by market appreciation and net new business
Q3 adjusted EPS of $7.62 beat consensus estimate
Net New Business YTD exceeds annual target

drivers.name: Technology automation investments
drivers.description: Reduced manual processing costs by $45M annually

risks.mitigation: Offshore strategy for non-client facing roles

targets.commentary: Efficiency ratio improved 170 bps YoY driven by automation and scale. On track to achieve 65% target by 2026.

drivers.name: Market volatility impact on fee income

risks.mitigation: Diversified revenue streams and fee structures

targets.commentary: ROE gap to target primarily driven by capital requirements. Revenue initiatives and efficiency improvements expected to close gap.

drivers.name: New client wins
drivers.description: $127B in net new AUC from 32 new clients

drivers.name: Cross-sell success
drivers.description: Fund admin and FX revenue up 6.2%

targets.commentary: Strong organic growth driven by new client wins and cross-sell. Alternative assets and APAC providing growth upside.

risks.mitigation: Focus on net new business and sticky clients

targets.commentary: Exceeding target with strong market performance and successful new business pipeline. Win rate improved to 42%.

risks.mitigation: Enhanced value proposition and pricing flexibility

targets.commentary: Industry-leading retention driven by service excellence and digital innovation. Lost only 10 clients vs. 32 new wins.

risks.description: Technology adoption barriers for legacy clients

targets.commentary: Strong momentum with 8 ppt increase YoY. On track for 85% by 2025 with continued platform investments.
Industry-leading STP rate improving operational efficiency and reducing errors. Automation roadmap supports 97% target.
Strong NPS improvement reflecting client satisfaction gains. Well-positioned to achieve 75+ target.

risks.mitigation: Increased security budget and continuous monitoring

targets.commentary: Steady progress but pace needs to accelerate. Increased investment approved for 2025 to reach 95 target.

boardHighlights.message: AUC growth of 8.2% exceeds target, driven by $127B net new business and strong market performance
Client retention at 97.8% continues to lead industry, with NPS improving to 72
ROE at 13.8% remains below 15% target; strategic initiatives underway to close gap through revenue growth and efficiency gains
Cybersecurity readiness at 88 requires accelerated investment to reach 95 target by 2025
Digital adoption reaching 72% with strong momentum; on track for 85% target by year-end 2025
